primary_apis: POST /api/review/nodes/{nid}/grade (调时带 final_grade_source='ai_accepted' · 复用 SC20-T03 实装)

acceptance_criteria.text: 新建 <AiJudgeBanner> 组件 (frontend/packages/ui-kit) · 接 {verdict, confidence, reason, matchedSteps, missedSteps, status, modelUsed, latencyMs} props · 5 子区 (nav 紫色 chip / hint ribbon / verdict 主区 / metarow chip / fallback) · 视觉与 mockup L322-L385 一致
新建 4 配套组件: <AiFlag> (nav center 紫色 chip · L189) · <AiMetaChip> (metarow 第 4 chip · L220) · <AiHintRibbon> (rating 上方紫色 hint · L401) · <AiMark> (角标 · L353)
扩展 <GradeButtons> 加 preselected prop ('MASTERED'|'PARTIAL'|'FORGOT'|null) · preselected 对应按钮渲染双 border + box-shadow + <AiMark> 角标 · aria-label '当前选择: PARTIAL · AI 建议'

P08 page state 加 aiJudge object + finalGradeSource · JUDGED_DONE 时 banner 渲染 + GradeButtons preselected=aiJudge.verdict · 学生 tap 采纳 CTA = tap 对应自评按钮 (调 :grade body{final_grade_source:'ai_accepted'}) · 学生 tap 其他按钮 = body{final_grade_source:'ai_overridden'}

i18n 加 14 key (exec.flag.aiJudged / exec.chip.aiConfidence / exec.judge.thinking / exec.judge.verdict.{mastered,partial,forgot} / exec.judge.cta.accept / exec.judge.cta.override / exec.judge.reason / exec.judge.matchedSteps / exec.judge.missedSteps / exec.judge.lowConfidence / exec.judge.timeout / exec.banner.fallback / exec.banner.modelUsed) · 中英双语
埋点: wb_judge_ai_done{nid, verdict, confidence, ms, model_used} 在 banner 渲染时上报 · wb_judge_user_accept{nid, ai_verdict} 在 tap CTA/对应按钮时上报 (沿 master sibling tracker pattern)

test_invariants: TI1: tap CTA 与 tap 对应自评按钮调相同 :grade 请求 (body 字面 diff = 0 · idempotency_key 一致)
TI2: preselected 视觉 ring 必须满足色盲友好 (aria-label '当前选择: PARTIAL · AI 建议' · 不仅靠颜色)
TI3: VRT 4 态: confidence=0.95 (双层 ring 强烈) / 0.55 (普通 ring) / null (无预选) / status='LOW_CONFIDENCE' (banner 退化)
TI4: banner 渲染 ≤ 150ms P95 (从 :judge 200 到完整可见 · 含 5 子区)
key_invariants: tap accept CTA = tap 对应自评按钮 (满足 satellite §2B.20 关键断言 · final_grade_source='ai_accepted')
preselected ring 不允许误导学生 (色盲友好 + 明确 aria-label · A.1 学生主体性)
